title: Ubiquiti UniFi Direct Attach Copper Cable, 10Gbps, 2m
category: Optical networks / DAC and AOC cables / DAC cables
description: UDC-2 is highly cost-effective way to connect two SFP/SFP+ devices (switches, routers, servers...) for short distances - up to 2m . They provide a low cost, low power and low latency interconnect solution for 10-Gigabit Ethernet, Fiber Channel and other industry standards, and are direct attached compliant and fully conform to the SFP+ MSA specifications
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP, SFP+ Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Passive Physical characteristics Length [m] 2 Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70
